A1500_PASRR_CD A1500 Preadmission Screening and Resident Review (PASRR) Code CHAR 1 The data in this column identifies if the resident has been evaluated by the Level II Preadmission Screening and
Resident Review (PASRR). -=Not assessed/no information
0=No
1=Yes
9=Not a Medicaid certified unit
^=Blank(skip pattern)
